original_abstract: POL-index is a comprehensive Polish citation database currently under development at the Interdisciplinary Centre for Mathematical and Computational Modelling (ICM), University of Warsaw. The project emerged from a 2012 evaluation of humanities and social sciences journals conducted by the Polish Ministry of Science and Higher Education. Designed with a flexible architecture for data collection, the system is transitioning toward a workflow that integrates directly with existing Polish bibliographic databases. This collaborative approach is intended to streamline the submission process and reduce the administrative burden on journal editorial boards. A key output of this framework is the Polish Impact Coefficient, which will be formally integrated into the national scholarly journal evaluation process starting in 2014.
humanized_abstract: POL-index – jest to baza odniesień (citation database) publikacji w języku polskim, aktualnie w toku tworzenia w Interdisciplinary Centre for Mathematical and Computational Modelling (ICM) Uniwersytetu Warszawskiego. W efekcie Evaluations of journals of humanities and social sciences in Poland, commissioned by the Polish Ministry of Science and Higher Education in 2012, the core of POL-index is currently being transformed into data collection module, and is planned to be linked with the existing bibliographic databases in Poland, thus decreasing the workload for journal editors. The evaluation of journals in Poland will include Polish Impact Coefficient in 2014.
